nasb.text: A widow is to be put on the list only if she is not less than sixty years old, having been the wife of one man,

esv.text: Let a widow be enrolled if she is not less than sixty years of age, having been the wife of one husband,

cnv.text: 寡婦登記，年紀必須到達六十歲，只作過一個丈夫的妻子，

ccb.text: 列入名册的寡妇必须年满六十岁，在婚姻上从一而终，

csbs.text: 应当算入寡妇之列的，不可小于六十岁；只做过一个男人的妻子；
